reviews.comment:
Un solo playero a las 22:15 de un domingo. Eramos varios para cargar y un solo playero para suministrar combustible y pasar la tarjeta,  que es lo que más demora.  Que pongan un playero más.

(Translated by Google)
There was only one attendant at 10:15 PM on a Sunday. Several of us were waiting to fill up, and there was only one attendant to pump the fuel and swipe the card, which is what takes the longest. They need to hire another attendant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8340619594879844057/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c3VEeU9nEAE
